song_name: Let My Love Open The Door
version_description: Acoustic version from "The Oceanic Concerts (1979/1980) with Raphael Rudd / https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q0w_BEQ5FH0.
tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: Let My Love Open The Door

content:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
         Let My Love Open the Door – Pete Townshend & Raphael Rudd
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

Written by: Pete Townshend
From: “The Oceanic Concerts”
      (recorded in 1979/1980, archival release in 2001)

Tabbed by: maguri
Tuning: Standard

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[tab]CHORDS
          E-A-D-G-B-e
Fsus2     1-3-3-0-1-1
F/G       3-x-3-2-1-1[/tab]

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

[Intro]
| [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] |
| [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] |

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
 When people keep repeating[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
That you'll never fall in love[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
When everybody keeps retreating[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
But you can't seem to get enough[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]       ([ch]C[/ch])
To your heart[/tab]

[Interlude]
| [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] |
| [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] |

[Verse 2]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
When everything feels all over[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
And everybody seems unkind[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
I'll give you a four-leaf clover[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
I take all worry out of your mind[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]       ([ch]Am[/ch])
To your heart[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[tab]| [ch]Am[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] | ([ch]C[/ch])
                          To your heart ...[/tab]
| [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] |

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
 I have the only key to your heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]
 I can stop you falling apart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fsus4[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]
Try today, you'll find this way[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Come on and give me a chance to say[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]
It's all I'm livin' for[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm[/ch]
Release yourself from misery[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F/G[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
There’s only one thing gonna set you free[/tab]

[Interlude]
[tab]     | [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] |
That’s my love[/tab]
[tab]     | [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] |
That’s my love[/tab]
[tab]     | [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] |
That’s my love[/tab]
[tab]     | [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]      | [ch]F[/ch] |
That’s my love, open the door[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
 When tragedy befalls you[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
Don't let it bring you down[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
Love can cure your problems[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
You're so lucky I'm around[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Fsus2[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
Let my love open the door[/tab]
[tab]       ([ch]C[/ch])
To your heart[/tab]

[Outro]
[tab]| [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] | ([ch]C[/ch])
          To your heart[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] | ([ch]C[/ch])
          To your heart[/tab]
[tab]| [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] | [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Fsus2[/ch] | [ch]C[/ch]
          To your heart (harp arpeggio)[/tab]
